title: Alex's Enchantments
description: Adds a total of 16 enchantments to your game.
body:
Welcome to Alex's Enchantments. A mod that focuses on enchantments to spice up your game a bit! If you like weapon enchantments, or just enchantments in general, this mod is for you! There is a total of 16 new and unique enchantments added to your game. Enchantments are:

Blessing of bacon, with level 2 it has a 100 percent chance to spawn a pig when attacking an entity, great for food management.

Anura, spawns frogs whenever you hit an entity. Use this if you like frogs... i guess

Poisoning, poisons mobs when attacking, great if you are running low on health and want to continue damaging mobs

Exploding, creates a small explosion when attacking, good for hitting multiple mobs at once

Lifesteal, when attacking entities you heal a bit of health, great for managing health

Curse of meowing, well, it's a curse but if you really want your sword to meow than get this enchantment!

Withering, gives wither affect to entities

Wetting, spawns water when attacking mobs, great for pushing back mobs

Blessing of Wealth, spawns a different level jewel for different levels

Villager's Dream, spawns emeralds whenever you hit a mob

Near Invincibility, makes you, well, nearly indestructible. You can only put it on armor level iron or lower.

Uselessness, needs no explanation, simple joke enchantment

Sponge summoner, spawns a sponge (Or two with level 2) when attacking. Great for clearing ocean monuments.

Nature's gift, with level 2 it has a 100% chance to spawn a sapling

Saturation, fills up hunger bar while fighting mobs.

Blessing of Light: level two spawns a torch with every hit on a mob

HAVE FUN!!!
